final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a dynamic basketball dunk scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "热血动漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Slam Dunk manga visual language, 1990s Weekly Shōnen Jump action panel composition, Kuroko's Basketball high-speed motion style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include dynamic motion blur, player mid-air for dunk as focal point
Subject: must include basketball player (one) executing a dunk, sweat droplets splashing
Scene/backdrop: must include basketball court setting with cheering crowd and camera flashes in background
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy, passionate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, energetic direction — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
